raw: {"perspective": "Code Quality Engineer", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Prioritize fixes based on technical debt and potential user impact", "rationale": "Fixing errors with high technical debt and user impact first will unblock the most critical features and improve overall system stability", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Delayed fixes may lead to increased technical debt, user frustration, and potential security vulnerabilities", "constitutional_violations_detected": "None", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Prioritize fixes based on technical debt and potential user impact
rationale: Fixing errors with high technical debt and user impact first will unblock the most critical features and improve overall system stability
